mapper.update: MERGE INTO weekly_reports (week_start, week_end, created_count, completed_count, completion_rate, category_breakdown, generated_at) KEY (week_start, week_end) VALUES (#{weekStart}, #{weekEnd}, #{createdCount}, #{completedCount}, #{completionRate}, #{categoryBreakdown}, #{generatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, week_start, week_end, created_count, completed_count, completion_rate, category_breakdown, generated_at FROM weekly_reports ORDER BY week_start DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, week_start, week_end, created_count, completed_count, completion_rate, category_breakdown, generated_at FROM weekly_reports WHERE id = #{id}
